nasb.text: you shall not be afraid of them; you shall well remember what the Lord your God did to Pharaoh and to all Egypt:

esv.text: you shall not be afraid of them but you shall remember what the Lord your God did to Pharaoh and to all Egypt,

cnv.text: 你不要怕他們，只要牢牢地記住，耶和華你的　神向法老和全埃及所行的事，

ccb.text: 不要怕他们，要牢记你们的上帝耶和华曾如何对付埃及和法老，
